Walls Comments: In overall good condition for its age, no significant defects observed and minimal wear and tear. Although insulation is inadequate and cannot retain heat enough for usage in cold weather.
Flooring Comments: Overall in poor condition there have been numerous instances of splitting of the vinyl due to concealed nails in the underlying floorboard
Ceilings Comments: In overall good condition, minimal wear and tear observed
Plumbing Comments: All taps appear to be functional and in good condition; All basins in good condition minimal to no defects observed
Cabinetry & Fixed Furniture Comments: Overall joinery such as cupboards and benchtops all appear to be in fair condition with minor wear and tear observed
